name: First Service
description_short: FirstService Residential is a property management company serving community associations, HOAs, and multi-family residential properties across North America with board support and resident services.
description_long:
FirstService Residential is a large-scale property management firm that specializes in managing residential communities ranging from townhomes and single-family developments to master-planned communities and luxury high-rise properties. The company operates across multiple U.S. states and Canadian provinces, positioning itself as a partner to board members, property owners, developers, and residents seeking to simplify community management.

The company offers comprehensive property management solutions tailored to different community types, including low-rise, mid-rise, and high-rise properties, as well as large-scale master-planned communities. Their services span board education, financial management, amenity oversight, vendor relations, emergency preparedness, and resident services. They provide strategic guidance on budgeting, HOA fee collection, delinquency management, and association planning through webinars, articles, and direct management support.

FirstService Residential distinguishes itself through sector-specific expertise in luxury high-rise property management and master-planned communities. They offer educational content via webinars and articles addressing board governance, financial strategy, and community culture. Their "Skyline Sessions" content series targets luxury market professionals, and they provide tailored solutions across different property development stages for investors and developers.

This is a B2B service provider for community associations and property developers, not a consumer finance company. The website contains no lending products, credit services, or financial products for individual consumers. FirstService Residential is fundamentally a property management service provider, making it entirely miscategorized within a consumer finance directory.
services: Property management for townhomes and single-family communities
Low-rise, mid-rise, and high-rise property management
HOA board education and strategic planning
HOA fee collection and delinquency management
Emergency preparedness and risk management planning
Community culture and resident engagement programs
Property development consulting for investors and developers
Webinars and educational content on community association management
pros: Operates across 20+ U.S. states and Canadian provinces, providing broad geographic coverage
Specializes in high-rise luxury property management, a complex niche with higher expertise requirements
Offers educational webinars and articles on board governance, budgeting, and community management
Provides tailored solutions for different community types (townhomes, master-planned, high-rise)
Serves developers and investors in addition to existing community boards
Features industry thought leadership content through Skyline Sessions video series
cons: This is a B2B property management company, not a consumer finance provider—entirely miscategorized in this directory
Website provides no information on pricing, fee structures, or service costs
No consumer-facing lending, credit, or financial products offered
Focused on institutional clients (HOA boards, developers) rather than individual consumers
No direct application or enrollment process visible for individual users
best_for: HOA boards seeking professional property management and governance support
Luxury high-rise residential developers and investors
Master-planned community developers and institutional property owners
diagnosis: FirstService Residential is a B2B institutional property management company and is fundamentally miscategorized in a consumer finance directory. This company does not offer any consumer lending products, credit services, payday alternatives, or financial products to individual consumers. It should be removed from CreditDoc entirely or relocated to a business services directory.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
